{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Aether manipulation
| introduced = lh-02-the-engineer
}}

== The Engineer ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|Basic [[Aether manipulation]] includes starting fires, making light, and telekinesis.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51">''The Engineer'', chapter 51</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|“All I can use is basic Aether manipulation,” Varic continued. “Start fires, make light, and a little telekinesis.”<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c51" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
